repo_recon.framework_detection.description: Identify exposed frameworks and operational surfaces.
repo_recon.framework_detection.remediation: Review detected operational surfaces and ensure only required interfaces remain exposed.

secrets_scan.hardcoded_secret.description: Detect obvious hardcoded secrets and API tokens.
secrets_scan.hardcoded_secret.remediation: Move the secret to an environment variable or secret manager and rotate the exposed value.

auth_scan.missing_auth_guard.description: Detect routes and handlers missing explicit auth checks.
auth_scan.missing_auth_guard.remediation: Add centralized auth middleware and explicit role or session validation to the route.

route_scan.exposed_admin_route.description: Detect admin-style routes with public exposure signals.
route_scan.exposed_admin_route.remediation: Place admin routes behind explicit middleware or segment them behind private or internal routing.

config_scan.risky_default.description: Detect permissive or development-oriented configuration defaults.
config_scan.risky_default.remediation: Scope development-only settings to local environments and fail closed in shared or production contexts.

dependency_scan.risky_dependency.description: Flag risky dependency categories and manifest drift heuristics.
dependency_scan.risky_dependency.remediation: Review necessity, pin versions deliberately, and isolate unsafe execution patterns behind strict validation.

ai_risk_scan.unsafe_tooling.description: Detect unsafe AI agent tool or prompt handling patterns.
ai_risk_scan.unsafe_tooling.remediation: Restrict tool permissions, validate tool inputs, and require explicit allowlists for filesystem or process access.
